○ pv-large · Add calendar event category filtering end-to-end   [● P2 · OPEN]
Owner: Stephen Howard · Type: task
Created: 2026-04-16 · Updated: 2026-04-16

DESCRIPTION
Add category filtering to the public calendar event listing. This spans:
- Backend API: new query parameter `?categories=` on the public events endpoint. Update `src/server/calendar/api/v1/public.ts`.
- Backend service: filter event instances by category membership. Update `src/server/calendar/service/events.ts`.
- Backend entity: add an index on the event-category join table migration `src/server/calendar/entity/migrations/20260416-add-category-index.ts`.
- Frontend site: add a multi-select chip component at `src/site/components/calendar/event_list.vue`.
- Frontend store: persist the active filter set in `src/site/stores/calendar.ts`.
- Frontend URL: reflect active filters as URL query parameters so links are shareable.
- Translations: add new keys across every site locale file (e.g. `src/site/locales/en.json`).

DESIGN
Split the work across the backend API/service/entity layers and the frontend site/store/URL layers, with translation updates as the connecting concern.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA
- [ ] API accepts `?categories=` and filters correctly
- [ ] Entity migration adds the covering index
- [ ] Site UI shows a multi-select filter component
- [ ] Pinia store round-trips filter state
- [ ] URL query parameters are parsed and emitted
- [ ] All locales updated
